text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital and I spot a crowd of<n>people by the
academy gates while<n>we're cooling down.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hm... It looks like there's a crowd of<n>fans
surrounding Falco!

text_block_list.name: Falco Fans
text_block_list.text:
You're so cute today, Falco! Ummm!<n>You're
always so radiant... I love you!<n>You're so cool
when you run!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I know... Like, I sooo feel the same.<n>I'd register
Falco as a world heritage<n>personality if I could.

text_block_list.name: High School Girl
text_block_list.text: Oh! Oh my gosh, it's the AgnesDigital! No one understands us otakulike you—you're a goddess amonggoddesses!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hyaaagh?! Um, a-a-and you are?

text_block_list.name: High School Girl
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm just your typical Umamusume<n>otaku!
Sorry to bother you all of a<n>sudden, heehee.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, so you're a Falco fan! You've<n>been waiting
for her as well, huh?

text_block_list.name: High School Girl
text_block_list.text:
...Actually, I am eternally and forever,<n>day and
night, the ultimate Digital fan!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?! Me?! But... why?! I mean...but why?!

text_block_list.name: High School Girl
text_block_list.text:
Because wherever I go, wherever I<n>look... you're
always there.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huehue... Cafe time with your bestie!<n>♪ Aw, no
fair! Look at them<n>spoon-feeding each other!

text_block_list.name: High School Girl
text_block_list.text:
That girl totally gets it! She knows<n>what a treasure
chest of ecstasy<n>afternoon tea is!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, glory be! Glory be! Today again, I<n>get to feast
my eyes one of life's<n>most supreme delights.

text_block_list.name: High School Girl
text_block_list.text: Her again...

text_block_list.name: High School Girl
text_block_list.text:
Look at her... how she gazes so<n>intently at her
oshi, all while keeping<n>optimal distance so as not
to intrude.

text_block_list.name: High School Girl
text_block_list.text: She's the real deal!

text_block_list.name: High School Girl
text_block_list.text:
I respect you as a kindred spirit, and,<n>more than
that, you set my heart<n>aflutter!

text_block_list.name: High School Girl
text_block_list.text:
All the feelings you inspire in me are<n>captured in
this letter. Please take it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
This letter she gave me is practically<n>a novel! Not
only that, she included<n>official prints from the
legendary<n>one-night-only Umamusume unit<n>event!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've got such a dependable kindred<n>spirit looking
over me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, my comrade! I'll take this<n>energy from
your support and pour it<n>all into my oshis!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital's spirits soar high after<n>receiving
the gift from her fan.
